$comment: Stage 3 Group A pinned MNN SDK lock (GAP-03). Every value below is a PLACEHOLDER — this file must not be used to build until the team's actually-approved SDK details are filled in. scripts/jetson_verify_mnn_lock.py refuses to proceed while any field still holds a placeholder value or 'latest'.
source_url: <REPLACE: official MNN SDK source URL — release tarball or git remote, never a mirror of unknown provenance>
git_commit: <REPLACE: full 40-char git commit SHA, or the exact release tag if the SDK is not built from git — never 'latest', 'main', or a floating tag>
sha256: <REPLACE: SHA-256 of the exact SDK archive/commit tree fetched from source_url>
l4t_version: <REPLACE: e.g. 35.6.4 — must match the actually-reflashed device, not an assumption>
compatibility_notes: <REPLACE: any known incompatibility or workaround between this MNN SDK version and the target JetPack/L4T, or 'none known' if genuinely verified>
approved_by: <REPLACE: name/handle of the person who approved this SDK selection>
